titleStmt.title: SII 29.105: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 105. (A.R. No. B. 564 of 1961-62.) KALLŪR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: It states that when Chālukya Jagadēkamalla was ruling over the empire from the capital Jayantīpura, Sātikavve made a grant of land in the presence of the mahājanas of agrahāra Kallūru to the temple of Kēśavadēva constructed by her. Mention is made of Būchidēvarasa and Kāvarājayya. The latter was the daṇḍanāyaka of Eḍedoṟe-2000 and the heggaḍe of paṭṭasāhaṇi hiriya daṇḍanāyaka Bīmaṇayya.
The record is dated in the regnal year 5, Dundubhi, Pushya, śu. 7, Friday, uttarāyaṇa saṅkramaṇa. It corresponds with 1142 A.D., December 25, Friday. However, the tithi was śu. 6.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpa cakravarti (śrī)jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ja
yantīpurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire
tatpāda padmōpajīvigaḷappa śrīmatpaṭṭasāhaṇe hiriya daṁḍanāya
kaṁ bīmaṇayyaṁgaḷa heggaḍe yeḍedoṟeyicchāsirada daṁḍanāyakaṁ kā
varājayyaṁgaḷu samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmāhāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhū
cidēvarasaru śrīmatsarbbanamasyadagrahāraṁ kallūraśēṣa mahājanaṁgaḷa di
ntibara saṁnidhānadalu śrīmatpratāpa cakravartti jagadēkamalavarṣa
(dā) 5 neya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada puṣya śuddha 7 śukravāra duttarāyaṇa
saṁkramaṇa nimittavāgi sātikavvegaḷu tāvmāḍisida śrīkēśavadēvaraṁga bhōga
naivēdya naṁdādīvigegaṁ caitrapavitrakkaveṁdu ballakabbegalu vīsakadalli baḍagaṇa ka
ḍeyaloṁdu vṛttiya kaḷedalli teṁkaṇa tammadoṁdu vrittiya keyyaṁ
samasta baḷi sahitavāgi dhārāpūrbakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru Ī dharmmamaṁ pra
pāḷisidavargge śrī vāraṇāśiyalu sāvira kavilegaḷa koḍuṁ
koḷagu maṁgalavankadalu kaṭṭisi caturvvēda pāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁ
koṭṭa palamaku . Idammamaṁ keḍisidavargge vāraṇāśiyalā kavile
gaḷmanā brāhmaṇarumaṁ koṁda dōṣavakku . sāmanyōyaṁ dharmma sētuṁ nripā
ṇaṁ kālē kālē pālaniyō bhavadbhiḥ sarbvānētānbāginaḥ pārtthi vēṁdrān bhūyō
bhūyō yācate rāma bhadrāṁ . svadattāṁ paradattā vāyō (ha)
rēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭivvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi(ḥ) .
Digital edition of SII 29.105 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
